overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a slow boat journey down a dark river at night, transitioning from open marshlands with bioluminescent vegetation and distant castle ruins to a narrow rocky canyon. The scene features moody moonlight filtering through storm clouds, atmospheric fog, and high-fidelity water rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: marshy river delta with bioluminescent flora

agents.ego_description: drifting slowly down the river in a small boat, observing the marshland surroundings and distant ruins

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees silhouetted against the night sky on the left bank
tall reeds and grasses lining both sides of the river
silhouetted stone structures or rocky outcrops visible on the distant horizon
bioluminescent vegetation emitting soft yellow-green light along the left bank

segments.scene_description: The journey begins in a wide, open marshland under a cloudy night sky. The camera drifts slowly along the water past silhouetted pine trees and glowing vegetation on the banks, with mysterious castle ruins visible in the distant mist on the right.

events.description: river banks transition from grassy marsh to rocky cliffs as the canyon begins to narrow

agents.ego_description: continuing downstream as the landscape becomes more rugged and enclosed by rock formations

entered.detail: steep rock faces replacing the grassy banks on the left side
steep rock faces replacing the grassy banks on the right side

segments.scene_description: The river enters a transitional zone where marshy banks give way to rocky cliffs. The distant castle fades from view as the canyon walls begin to rise on both sides, and the glowing plants recede into the distance behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rock canyon with towering walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through the tight canyon passage with towering rock walls closing in on both sides

entered.detail: towering vertical rock walls rising high above the water on the left
towering vertical rock walls rising high above the water on the right

segments.scene_description: The river narrows dramatically into a deep canyon with towering rock walls on both sides. The sky becomes a thin slit overhead as the boat drifts through the enclosed passage, with only the dark stone walls and rushing water visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark river that transforms from an expansive, bioluminescent marshland into a claustrophobic rocky canyon. It begins drifting through wide open waters under a cloudy night sky, passing silhouetted pine trees and glowing vegetation while distant castle ruins loom in the mist. As the boat progresses, the marshy banks gradually give way to rising stone cliffs, causing the distant ruins and glowing flora to recede and fade from view. The scene then narrows dramatically as the river enters a deep gorge, where towering rock walls close in from both sides. Finally, the environment shifts into a tight enclosed passage, leaving only a thin slit of sky visible overhead above the dark stone and rushing water.
